basic_details.short_information: Calcutta University Project Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website https://www.caluniv.ac.in. A total of 1 Project Assistant vacancy has been announced through the Calcutta University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.

rows.calcutta_university: M.Sc. degree from any recognized university

content_sections.heading: Calcutta University Project Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Calcutta University Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Calcutta University Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Calcutta University Project Assistant Vacancy Details 2026
Calcutta University Project Assistant Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: M.Sc. degree from any recognized university

content_sections.heading: Calcutta University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Calcutta University Project Assistant Selection Process 2026
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for Calcutta University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: Calcutta University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for the Project Assistant post at Calcutta University?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Project Assistant post at Calcutta University is scheduled for 27 July 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum qualification required for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Project Assistant position is an M.Sc. degree from any recognized university.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Assistant role will receive a salary of Rs. 20,000 per month plus 24% HRA.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant post at Calcutta University.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for this recruitment will be based on a Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and category certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the Calcutta University office in Kolkata, West Bengal (Pin code: 700019).

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for this Project Assistant position is Temporary.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates from any recognized university apply?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with an M.Sc. degree from any recognized university are eligible to apply for this position.
